error_signature: horizontal scroll not working inside expanded layout
title: Horizontal scroll issue in expanded layout
symptom: The datagrid does not display a horizontal scroll when placed inside an expanded layout, causing overflow issues.
applies_when: Using a datagrid inside an expanded layout
Width settings are not correctly configured
not_this_if: Datagrid is outside of an expanded layout
Width settings are already set to 100%
root_cause: The expanded layout may have restrictive width settings that prevent child elements from displaying correctly. If the child elements do not have appropriate width and max-width settings, they can overflow without providing a scroll option.
fix_steps: Set the expanded layout's width to 100%.
Set the child element (datagrid) to a max-width of 100%.
agent_instruction: Adjust the width settings of the expanded layout and datagrid to ensure proper scrolling functionality.
